description: A practical and stylish choice of bag from kiara with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this smooth blended bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit.Height: 22 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 8 cmMade of textured synthetic leather for durabilityFlap with metal detailing and magnetic button closureTwo pockets on the frontOne main zippered compartment with a zippered separator, a zippered compartment and two pouchesOne zippered compartment at the backTwo removable straps for ease of carryingCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
